preferences.mini_agent_project: The mini_agent project is a Go-based AI Agent framework located at D:\workspacke\agent\mini_agent. It's configured to use MiniMax-M2.5 model with Anthropic API. The project has tools for bash execution, file read/write/edit, and note-taking. The config file is at mini_agent/config/config.yaml. The main executable is mini-agent.exe.
